chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. D – 35 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 01.02.2023 Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Niazuddin N. Memon, Advocate for the applicant, under instructions does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, which stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
